persona_name: Marcus — Returning User with Multiple Trips

ux_issues.description: Usage counter shows 2 messages used but 4 AI messages were sent (selection Greece, planning Santorini, companion Morocco, selection NZ). The counter appears to only count messages in planning/companion modes, not selection mode. This may be intentional but could confuse users checking their quota.
ux_issues.suggestion: Clarify in the usage endpoint response or docs whether selection-mode messages count toward the daily limit.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The multi-trip workflow worked flawlessly. Vague reference matching ('my Greece trip' -> 'Greek Islands Hopping') was instant and correct. Trip switching via selection mode was seamless. The AI correctly distinguished between selecting existing trips and creating new ones. The 3-day Santorini itinerary was genuinely excellent — 9 well-structured items with practical tips, timing, and location details. The Morocco companion response was relevant and concise. The only reason companion_mode_score is 4 instead of 5 is that only one companion message was tested per the persona spec.
